string 2: Hmm... HMM...
{next}What happened?
{next}Hmm...
{end}I'll leave you alone.

Oh... When did you get here? Got a moment to listen to my
woes?
...Don't mock me. I'm really troubled, here!
Hmmm...

...So they say Junomon went crazy after being overtaken by 
negative emotions.

The cause was apparently some nebulous, unsure thing called
"love" or "adoration"...

You humans would likely call this "love"...
But is it truly all that important?
{next}I would say so, yeah.
{next}It's not all that important.
{next}Do Digimon have those kinds of feelings?

What...? And yet people willingly give themselves over to
something so terrifying?!

Really...? You sure you aren't just saying that to blow me
off?

Well, I don't feel like I use that word very often... Or
maybe never at all?

But if the cultures of the human and Digital worlds continue
to influence each other...

Perhaps that is a concept that originated in the human
world...

Junomon has been through a lot. I haven't
changed a bit, though.

I was thinking maybe people change when they develop
feelings for someone or something.

They might start thinking or acting differently once they
fall in love.
{next}It's certainly possible.
{next}That's difficult to imagine.
{next}Why not try falling in love yourself?
It is, right...? And that's why Junomon is different now.
Really? But Junomon is clearly not the same!

What? With who? You? No way. Not happening. At least not
now!

IF people change when they fall in love... I want to make
sure that doesn't happen to me!

I feel like I'd be upset with myself for changing. I don't
want to be seen like that.

So I'd better learn what it is to love a person before such
a time arrives.
{next}And how would you do that?
{next}You'll know when the time comes.
{next}Go ahead and love away, then.

Well, humans know more about this kind of thing than anyone,
no? So I need human help.

That's precisely what I want to avoid. I'm trying not to get
taken by surprise.

Look. I just want to understand love in an intellectual way,
not actually fall in love!
I suppose the best thing here would be to ask a human.

I need an expert on what it is to love someone or
something... But who...?

Hey, what about that one woman? Come on. You know who I
mean...
{next}Hiroko?
{next}Asuna Shiroki?
{next}Dr. Simmons?

Yeah, her. Out of the humans I've met, she's the most with
it... at least in my opinion.
Who's that?

The human that's referred to as "the doctor"? I feel like
she's different...

Hiroko is probably the only human woman I know who can give
me the answers I seek.
Now, let's go ask her. Together.
{next}Okay.
{next}See you later!
{next}Why not talk to me about love?
I knew I could count on you! Let's get going, then!
...I said "together." Don't try to make me go by myself!

You were never a candidate. But don't worry. We're all
useful in our own way.

Now, let's go see Hiroko. In situations like these, it's
best to take action right away!
Hmm... Okay. I think I get what you're asking about.

I want to know all about what it is to like someone... to
fall in love.
Could you tell me?

It's not an easy question to answer. Listen. Love holds a
LOT of mysteries, even for us.

Our psychologists and philosophers don't have any answers
after endless research.
Hmm. So you mean there's no point in trying to understand?

No, I didn't say that. All I'm saying is that love isn't so
easily explained.

Love takes on different forms for everyone. You'd need to
study not just one, but lots.
So how can I go about observing the love of others?
How about we watch some romantic movies?
Romantic movies?

As in, footage of people falling in love. All fiction, but
fiction made by humans.

I'll pick out a few and we can have a viewing party in the
movie room downstairs!

Ah, so this is where you watch those "movie" things! I'm
actually a little excited!

I just picked one at random... First up is "This Is the
End."

Inori's pop loved movies ever since he was a young boy, and
amassed quite a collection.

This one was displayed right in front. So, without further
ado, let the screening begin!
What...? But...
Why?! Why did it end like that?!

That motorcycle thief protag was too shy. He kept the
heroine waiting the whole movie!

And then, even in the end, they never found happiness. It's
a pretty irritating movie.

Why would Inori's pop put this one right up front? I don't
get his taste in movies...

But that vehicle the hero was riding... A motorcycle, was
it? That was pretty cool.

If I fall in love, I want it to be like this. I'm certain
that love wouldn't change me.
Well, I suppose it's time to go now. Thanks for everything.

You're very welcome. Drop by again if you ever have an itch
to watch more movies!

*sigh* So that was love...? Well, at least I gained an
appreciation for movies.

Thank you for all of your help. Here's a little something as
a reward. Be seeing you!
